text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now that training's over, it's time for<n>that special
reward... Pretty please!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I saw it in my morning fortune-telling<n>session! "A
shuttle full of sparkles."<n>That can only mean—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh? Taiki Shuttle? Oh, no, no, no! I<n>was—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Could this mean that Taiki is<n>the shuttle that
brings the sparkles?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oho! So you want somethin' sparkly,<n>do ya? Then,
I got just the thing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
(Great! Taiki's from the US, so I bet<n>it's a great
big piggy bank full of<n>silver dollars!)

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Come partner runnin' with me! Your<n>skin'll shine
real good with the sweat<n>I'll have you workin' up!
♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You want us to go partner running? I<n>guess that
would be one way to<n>create an abundance of
sparkles...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, haha! I'd love to, but I need my<n>trainer's
permission first...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What should I do? Run with Taiki... or<n>do you have
a reward for me?
choice_data_list: I guess I can prepare something...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Argh! I had an feeling you'd say that!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru puts her all into<n>her extra
training.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yesss! I worked super hard today,<n>after all! So,
what kind of sparkly<n>reward have you got for me?
♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Now, wait just a gosh darn minute!<n>Didn't you
say you were going to "fill<n>Taiki Shuttle up with
sparkles"?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I meet both their expectations by<n>giving them two
sparkling... cans of<n>juice.
